content.en:
"True Dragon Worm Mother!"

Ye Tian learned about the horror of the True Dragon Worm Mother, and he also frowned slightly.

Moreover, he now knew that the True Dragon Worms that invaded the Silent Black Sea before were all bred by the True Dragon Worm Mother, and the purpose was to devour the creatures of the Silent Black Sea and feed them back to the True Dragon Worm Mother and help the True Dragon Worm Mother improve her strength.

If he hadn't been in the Silent Black Sea, the Silent Black Sea would have become a place of dead silence altogether.

But the problem at the moment is to kill the True Dragon Worm Mother, otherwise when the True Dragon Worm Mother grows to the Heavenly Ancestor level, who knows what disaster will be caused!

If the other party doesn't provoke him and doesn't invade the Silent Black Sea, he won't be too lazy to do it.

But now it was different, that Heavenly Ancestor was completely crazy and invaded the major immeasurable realms, devouring countless living beings to help the True Dragon Worm Mother grow.

Now he has to attack one realm after another, which shows that he will inevitably attack the invincible fifth-stage Great Ancestor and Heavenly Ancestor in the future.

Therefore, it is necessary to kill the true dragon insect mother before it gets up.

The other side.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor convened a group of Heavenly Ancestors for a meeting, and the purpose was very simple, that is, to find out the location of the True Dragon Worm Mother, and to find out the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor is the most likely, so finding him can be confirmed.

In addition, summon a large number of invincible level 5 stages to kill the True Dragon Worm to prevent the True Dragon Worm from devouring too many living beings.

And the major forces have issued the task of killing the true dragon insects, so for a period of time, many real dragon insects were discovered and killed one by one.

However.

Even if the true dragon insect is killed, the true dragon insect mother can also recover part of the energy through special means, so the loss will not be too great.

In addition, there is the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor who is helping the True Dragon Worm Mother to continuously recover her energy, so the True Dragon Worm Mother can continue to give birth to more True Dragon Worms.

As a result, the true dragon worm is almost inexhaustible!

It was precisely because of this that the True Dragon Worm Mother would make those Heavenly Ancestors fearful.

Some Celestial Ancestors tried to track down the True Dragon Worm using special tracking methods.

However, after the True Dragon Worm is released, it will not go back.

Therefore, it is almost unrealistic to find the location of the true dragon worm mother through the true dragon worm.

......

"Another wave of real dragon worms!"

Ye Tian hid in the shadows and saw dozens of True Dragon Worms preparing to invade a territory, led by an Invincible Level Fifth Stage True Dragon Worm.

With his strength, he could naturally easily wipe out this group of true dragon insects, but there was no point.

"There is a true dragon worm in the fifth stage of the invincible level, it seems that the true dragon worm mother has reached the boundary breaking level!"

He first passed this information to the other Heavenly Ancestors, so that the Heavenly Ancestors would know the situation.

And he has a plan, but it is not clear whether it will succeed.

He is going to copy a true dragon worm to copy the body, and through this true dragon worm to copy the body, can he contact the true dragon worm mother, so as to lock the other party's location.

Even if the plan is not successful, you can mix the replica body of the true dragon worm into this batch of true dragon worms and wait for the opportunity.

"Copy!"

Soon, a true dragon worm copied its body.

Subsequently, he disguised himself as an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor to attack these True Dragon Worms, and a battle broke out with them.

Thundered!!!

One by one, the true dragon insects died in his hands, and the other fifth-stage great ancestors would come to support, so these true dragon insects directly chose to flee when they saw that the situation was not good.

In this process, Ye Tian's copy body was also mixed in.

The speed of the true dragon insect was very fast, and it disappeared in the blink of an eye.

"If you get in, I don't know if you can lock the location of the real dragon worm mother?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Ye Tian's True Dragon Worm Replica Body followed this batch of True Dragon Worms to transfer, but it definitely wouldn't go to the True Dragon Worm Mother's side, and Heavenly Ancestor tried to track it for a long time, but it had no effect.

This batch of True Dragon Worms will only look for other nearby realms, and then continue to invade until this batch of True Dragon Worms completely falls and dies.

Abrupt.

A strange message came into the minds of every true dragon insect, and Ye Tian's replica body actually accepted it.

After all, in essence, his duplicate body was also a true dragon worm, exactly the same as the true dragon worm that he copied, so it was normal to receive information.

This set of information is to go to a certain territory and invade and devour living beings.

It's a very simple instruction!

And Ye Tian began to deduce the location of the source of the instruction through this instruction.

This kind of deduction requires the replica body of the true dragon insect as a medium, trying to take the initiative to contact the true dragon insect mother, and then carry out the deduction.

Of course, it will be exposed, but it doesn't matter.

Anyway, it's just a copy of the body, and when the time comes, it's just a copy of another one.

Airplanes!!!

The deduction begins!

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to sense an incomparably powerful origin, very warm, as if he was a mother-like existence.

Of course, this is because the true dragon insect is conceived by the mother of the real dragon worm, so it will feel this way.

Ye Tian sensed the existence of the True Dragon Worm Mother, and the True Dragon Worm Mother also sensed the abnormality of this True Dragon Worm.

Click!

The connection in the dark was forcibly severed by the True Dragon Worm Mother, and other True Dragon Worms began to besiege Ye Tian's replica body.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and made a move, casting a ten-armed golden body, and the ten arms held this area, and one by one the true dragon insects were pinched and exploded.

In an instant, this batch of true dragon insects was completely wiped out.

"Failed to lock the exact location, but the approximate location was confirmed!"

Ye Tian immediately informed the other Heavenly Ancestors of the approximate location of the suspected True Dragon Worm Mother.

However, whether these Heavenly Ancestors are willing to believe it or not, that is their business.

Swish!

Ye Tian rushed over to that location by himself, trying to find the location of the true dragon worm mother.

......

"What, there's a problem with one of your true dragon worms, and there's a force trying to find out your location?"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor received the summons from the True Dragon Worm Mother, and immediately frowned.

He wondered if his current location would be discovered, and if it did, it would be troublesome.

But if you leave now, it's easy to be discovered!

As a result, he was caught in a dilemma.

"Maybe I didn't find out, the True Dragon Worm Mother wouldn't have been locked so easily, otherwise it wouldn't have caused such a big disaster before!" Wutong Heavenly Ancestor thought to himself.

After pondering for a while, he decided to be different for the time being, he felt that after moving, it was easier to be found halfway.

Immediately, he tried his best to hide himself, and asked the True Dragon Worm Mother not to give birth to the True Dragon Worm for the time being, and waited for a while.
